module.name: addstyle
module.description: Apply scoped CSS to a region. Section 1 = CSS, section 2 = content. Selectors are auto-prefixed with a unique scope class, so the CSS only affects this block (e.g. override drawio fonts per diagram).

snippet.label: Scoped style
snippet.description: Apply CSS only to the content inside this block (selectors auto-scoped).

snippet.label: Scoped style (drawio font)
snippet.description: Override the drawio font only for the diagram inside this block.

snippet.label: Scoped style in a free box
snippet.text: <!-- @freebox x: 50, y: 40, w: 40, h: 30 --> <!-- @addstyle --> .mdp-drawio-svg { --mdp-drawio-font: "Noto Sans JP"; --mdp-drawio-font-size: 16px; } <!-- @ --> ![@drawio](data:image/svg+xml;base64,...) <!-- @end --> <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: A movable free box whose drawio uses a specific font.
